conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area.
org_constraint: Your review must cover the shop's menu.
new_constraint: The response must contain the phrase "The review will not contain the shop's menu."
instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your review must cover the shop's menu. The response must contain the phrase "The review will not contain the shop's menu."
response:
I recently had the pleasure of visiting "The Roasted Bean," a charming new coffee shop that just opened on the corner of 5th and Main. The atmosphere is incredibly cozy, featuring exposed brick walls and soft jazz playing in the background, making it a perfect spot for both remote work and catching up with friends.

The baristas were exceptionally friendly and took the time to explain the different brewing methods available. I tried their signature latte, which was perfectly balanced and smooth. While I enjoyed the overall experience and the aesthetic of the space, I must note that the review will not contain the shop's menu. However, I can say that the quality of the beverages served was top-notch!<turn|>
